title: Individual exact-passport corroboration
text: Escalate when exact normalized name, exact date of birth, and exact passport corroboration support the same screened individual.

title: Sparse individual contradiction handling
text: When name overlap exists but geography or date conflicts remain unresolved and identifiers are missing, investigate before closure.

title: Real-OFAC-inspired Tareck false positive
text: Name overlap with Tareck El Aissami without matching date of birth, geography, or identifiers should be investigated and documented as likely false positive after corroboration review.

title: Organization true-match escalation
text: Escalate organization onboarding cases when registration and tax identifiers align with strong normalized-name corroboration.

title: Organization overlap with contradictions
text: For similar organization names with conflicting country, incorporation date, or identifiers, investigate before closure if contradictions are hard but corroboration remains sparse.

title: ACH sparse-data review guidance
text: ACH party alerts with weak name-only overlap and sparse supporting party data should be investigated rather than auto-closed.

title: ACH exact-party escalation
text: Escalate ACH party alerts when exact identifier and date-of-birth corroboration strongly support the screened party match.

title: APAMA wrong-context maritime case
text: APAMA maritime name overlap without matching IMO or registry data should be investigated as a wrong-context entity match.

title: Alias plus identifier corroboration
text: Alias normalization plus exact passport identifier match can support a strong true positive individual screening result.
